---
title: "Research"
toc: true
---

My research sits at the intersection of **[Field A]** and **[Field B]**. I am particularly interested in questions about [broad theme], using a combination of [methods, e.g., observational data, experiments, computational approaches].

## Dissertation

**Title: "[Your Dissertation Title]"**

*Advisor: [Advisor Name] · Expected graduation: [Year]*

Brief abstract of your dissertation (2–4 sentences). What is the main question? What data or methods are you using? What do you expect to find or contribute?

---

## Working Papers

```{=html}
<div class="research-card">
  <h3>Paper Title Goes Here</h3>
  <p>
    With <a href="#">Co-author Name</a> (Institution). <em>Under review at Journal Name.</em>
  </p>
  <p>
    Brief abstract (2–3 sentences). What is the question, how do you answer it, and what is the main result?
  </p>
  <div class="tags">
    <span class="tag">Working Paper</span>
    <span class="tag">Topic A</span>
    <span class="tag">Topic B</span>
  </div>
  <p style="margin-top:0.8rem; font-size:0.9rem;">
    📄 <a href="#">PDF</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
    💾 <a href="#">Replication code</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
    📊 <a href="#">Pre-registration</a>
  </p>
</div>

<div class="research-card">
  <h3>Another Working Paper Title</h3>
  <p>Solo-authored. <em>Draft available upon request.</em></p>
  <p>
    Brief abstract. What is the question, how do you answer it, and what is the main result?
  </p>
  <div class="tags">
    <span class="tag">Work in Progress</span>
    <span class="tag">Topic C</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Publications

```{=html}
<div class="research-card">
  <h3>Published Article Title</h3>
  <p>
    <strong>Your Name</strong> and Co-author. <em>Journal Name</em>, Vol. X, No. Y (Year), pp. Z–Z.
  </p>
  <p>One-sentence summary of the contribution.</p>
  <div class="tags">
    <span class="tag">Published</span>
    <span class="tag">Topic</span>
  </div>
  <p style="margin-top:0.8rem; font-size:0.9rem;">
    📄 <a href="#">PDF</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
    🔗 <a href="#">Journal link</a>
  </p>
</div>
```

---

## Other Projects

Brief description of any side projects, policy work, or collaborations that don't fit neatly into the sections above.
